title: Beyond Control
storyPurpose: Seris's network exceeds even Aurelia's control.

panels.description: Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal and royal trade ledger connecting Lost City Rift component to auction console — ledger pages flying open as door maps.

Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains rare anger; routes on wall shifting without her consent.

bubbles.text: Those doors are mine to close.
bubbles.speaker: Aurelia Voss

panels.description: Portal engine tremor; bazaar lanterns flickering red.

bubbles.text: When a network outgrows its merchant, the market breaks.

dialogue.text: Those doors are mine to close.
dialogue.speaker: Aurelia Voss

captions.text: When a network outgrows its merchant, the market breaks.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black lacquer wood and brass first; warm gold filigree, deep red merchant fabric, teal Rift glass lanterns and crystal accents. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Merchant's Secret" Issue #6, STORY PAGE 15/25 — Beyond Control. Story purpose: Seris's network exceeds even Aurelia's control. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p15a): Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal and royal trade ledger connecting Lost City Rift component to auction console — ledger pages flying open as door maps. Panel 2 (p15b): Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains rare anger; routes on wall shifting without her consent. Panel 3 (p15c): Portal engine tremor; bazaar lanterns flickering red. Characters: aurelia-voss, seris-vale. Creatures: lockjaw-wisp. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Merchant lock: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains. Lockjaw lock: Lockjaw Wisp: small feline-lizard companion, black fur with warm gold filigree markings, keyhole-shaped pupils, floating brass appraisal rings, silent gait, phases through sealed doors when invited by contract. Environment: Gilded Crossroads moving bazaar. Time: night. Weather: lantern-lit market mist. Lighting: warm gold lanterns and teal Rift glass glow. Continuity: {"location": "auction control room", "seris": "beyond-aurelia-control"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit, companion trafficking glorified
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; merchant speech polished/controlled.
artAlt: Beyond Control — The Merchant's Secret page 15
transcript: SPEECH (Seris Vale): Your network, Merchant. My keys.
SPEECH (Aurelia Voss): Those doors are mine to close.
NARRATION: When a network outgrows its merchant, the market breaks.
